docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,100.00 FILED BY BAYDA, MOLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JACKIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE WITH SUPPORTING DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYDA, MOLLIE
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYDA, MOLLIE AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JACKIE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED MAR-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JACKIE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIM, JACKIE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-19-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS FILED IN THIS MATTER ORDERED DESTROYED - ADDED TO SEPTEMBER, 2018 EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION LIST.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BAYDA, MOLLIE
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO DEFENDANT LIM ON 6/19/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MOLLIE BAYDA DID NOT APPEAR IN PERSON OR THROUGH COURTCALL. DEFENDANT JACKIE LIM APPEARED, THROUGH KOREAN INTERPRETER SONG AE PARK. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYDA, MOLLIE
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYDA, MOLLIE
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
ORDER : CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF.
